'''Kathy Tyers''' is the author of several novels and short stories for the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe. She was born on [[July 21]], [[1950s#1952|1952]] in [[Wikipedia:Long Beach, California|Long Beach, California]]. In addition to her work in the ''Star Wars'' universe, she has written several other [[Wikipedia:science fiction|science fiction]] novels, as well a few non-science-fiction publications. She has also recorded two [[Wikipedia:folk music|folk music]] albums with her husband Mark, who died in 2004. She currently lives in [[Wikipedia:Montana|Montana]].

Tyers graduated from [[Wikipedia:Montana State University|Montana State University]] with a degree in [[Wikipedia:microbiology|microbiology]] and, after marrying Mark, became certified to teach [[Wikipedia:K-12|K-12]]. When her church opened a private school, she took over teaching the lower grades. In [[1979]], she retired from teaching to start a family; their son Matthew was born in [[1981]], and she began writing in earnest two years later.

{{Author-stub}}
